## Submission checklist

- [ ] Placed in the right directory (`reference-implementations/` / `tools/` / `integrations/` / `examples/`) or added as an [INDEX](../INDEX.md) entry (external project)
- [ ] README / INDEX entry states **what it is** and its **DACS surface** (modules + § it touches)
- [ ] **Conformance status declared honestly**: `vector-tested` (name the vectors) / `exercises-spec` / `prototype`
- [ ] Run instructions work from a fresh clone
- [ ] License declared (MIT-compatible in-tree; OSI-approved external)
- [ ] No secrets (keys, private endpoints, non-test mnemonics)
